subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-10-06
subcodes.first_line: The most important issue confronting humanity today is one religious in character. Religion should be the cause of fellowship and unity among mankind
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @Christ; Christianity, @suffering and imprisonment, @unity in diversity, @war and peace, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @teachings as spirit of the age, @relativity of religious truth
